Pass 2 row 129.P2.75 hypothesizes Lester Maddox; the "Lustromatics" rendering is highly unusual and could also be a Whisper render of "lust romantics" or even a different surname entirely. Flag-adjacent — keep as LOW pending Maddox-1965-Americus-itinerary check.
Worth noting Briggs Hunt was 1932 LA Olympics wrestler + UCLA wrestling coach 1934-58 — significant for any UCLA athletic-history cross-reference. (Catalog observation, not an add.)

Raw SRT line 759: "Maria Gitton University Alabama about scope, scope workers after my effort to for organize our first SNCCAS reunion every year." Speaker means SCOPE-alumni reunion (which he later confirms at line 763: "Multiple ones, every 10 years, 50 years"). "SNCCAS" is Whisper-mishearing of either "SCOPE" or "SCOPE/SNCC/SCLC alumni" compound.

Raw SRT line 1319: "Ron McMacKinn is a buddy of Mark McGuire, Galsville Mark McGuire, and Tiger Woods." Speaker is identifying the geographic origin/college of Mark McGwire — McGwire grew up in Claremont CA (within LA County) and attended USC (Los Angeles). "Galsville" is unidentified geographic-Whisper-failure; could be "Claremont's" or "Glendora's" or simply Whisper hash. Flag-adjacent.

pending_context.candidate_correction: (Bill Randall office contact) "got Doranl/Doran on the phone"
pending_context.notes: Raw SRT line 1959: "I went in the barbershop and I've got Doranl on the phone and I said Bill, or maybe it was Joel." Speaker is calling Bill Randall's Macon-NAACP-office to report being harassed; "Doranl" is uncatalogued Whisper-failure for an office staffer name. Flag-adjacent.

pending_context.whisper: "Dorandos office with his son Harry" (Macon election-night context)
pending_context.notes: Raw SRT line 3111: "That night after the election, I met Dorandos office with his son Harry, who worked for the state." Speaker is in a Macon GA Black-community-leader's office on Marcus Moon election night. "Dorando" is a Macon GA contact whose actual name (Doran? Durand? Daniel?) cannot be resolved without external Macon-NAACP-1965-roster check. Flag-adjacent.
